channel.title: MyBatis on Jason's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in MyBatis on Jason's Blog

item.title: MyBatis Plus 开发指南
item.description: Mapper 扫描 import org.mybatis.spring.annotation.MapperScan; import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration; @Configuration @MapperScan(basePackages = "org.example.mybatis.mapper") public class MyBatisConfiguration { } CRUD 基础接口 Mapper CRUD 基础接口 import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.mapper.BaseMapper; import org.example.mybatis.model.User; public interface UserMapper extends BaseMapper<User> { } Service CRUD 基础接口 import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.impl.ServiceImpl; import org.example.mybatis.mapper.UserMapper; import org.example.mybatis.model.User; import org.springframework.stereotype.Service; @Service public class MyBatisService extends ServiceImpl<UserMapper, User> { } 拦截器 MyBatis 拦截器按顺
